/* * Note that we cannot apply the `internal` tag here because the declaration * needs to survive the `stripInternal` option. Otherwise, `AnyCatcher` will * be `any` in the `.d.ts` files. */ declare const anyCatcherSymbol: unique symbol; /** * This is just a type that we're using to identify `any` being passed to * function overloads. This is used because of situations like {@link forkJoin}, * where it could return an `Observable<T[]>` or an `Observable<{ [key: K]: T }>`, * so `forkJoin(any)` would mean we need to return `Observable<unknown>`. */ export type AnyCatcher = typeof anyCatcherSymbol;
